name: Apricot Angel Brownies
recipeIngredient: 2 Bars (2 oz ea) white baking chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt chocolate and butter over low heat, stirring constantly until all the chocolate is melted.
2. Remove from the heat; stir in brown sugar, eggs and vanilla until blended. Set aside.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder and salt. Stir in chocolate mixture.
4. Combine apricots, almonds and coconut; stir half into batter.
5. Pour into a greased 9-inch square baking pan. Sprinkle remaining apricot mixture on top.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes or until golden brown. Cool.
